message:
Add QueryResults type alias and from_data constructor

API improvements to QueryResultTable:
- Add QueryResults type alias for more concise usage
- Add from_data(columns, rows) convenience constructor
- Enable direct table creation from column names and row data
- Export QueryResults from renderables module

Update E2E tests to use new API:
- Simplify test setup with from_data constructor
- Update error_display, full_workflow, progress_tracking, query_results
- Improve test readability with cleaner table initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
